translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The elder to Gaius the beloved, whom I love in truth.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Beloved, I pray that you may prosper in all things and be healthy, even as your soul prospers.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For I rejoiced greatly, when brothers came and testified about your truth, even as you walk in truth.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I have no greater joy than this, to hear about my children walking in truth.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Beloved, you do a faithful work in whatever you accomplish for those who are brothers and strangers.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They have testified about your love before the assembly. You will do well to send them forward on their journey in a way worthy of God,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: because for the sake of the Name they went out, taking nothing from the Gentiles.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: We therefore ought to receive such, that we may be fellow workers for the truth.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I wrote to the assembly, but Diotrephes, who loves to be first among them, doesn’t accept what we say.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Therefore if I come, I will call attention to his deeds which he does, unjustly accusing us with wicked words. Not content with this, neither does he himself receive the brothers, and those who would, he forbids and throws out of the assembly.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Beloved, don’t imitate that which is evil, but that which is good. He who does good is of God. He who does evil hasn’t seen God.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Demetrius has the testimony of all, and of the truth itself; yes, we also testify, and you know that our testimony is true.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I had many things to write to you, but I am unwilling to write to you with ink and pen;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: but I hope to see you soon, and we will speak face to face. Peace be to you. The friends greet you. Greet the friends by name.
